sqlMap.select: select * from AreaOfPracticeRealEstateLW where AOPREKey = #AOPREKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into AreaOfPracticeRealEstateLW(AOPREKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey PercentageValue AOPRECommentDesc LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#AOPREKey:NUMERIC#, #VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #PercentageValue# #AOPRECommentDesc# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# )
sqlMap.select: select PercentageValue, AOPRECommentDesc, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, AOPREKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from AreaOfPracticeRealEstateLW where AOPREKey = #AOPREKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update AreaOfPracticeRealEstateLW set
PercentageValue = #PercentageValue# PercentageValue = null AOPRECommentDesc = #AOPRECommentDesc# AOPRECommentDesc = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where AOPREKey = #AOPREKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from AreaOfPracticeRealEstateLW where AOPREKey = #AOPREKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from AreaOfPracticeRealEstateLW where AOPREKey = #AOPREKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select PercentageValue, AOPRECommentDesc, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, AOPREKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from AreaOfPracticeRealEstateLW where AOPREKey = #AOPREKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select AOPREKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, PercentageValue, AOPRECommentDesc, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from AreaOfPracticeRealEstateLW where AOPREKey = #AOPREKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
